title: Candidate Revisions Now Available
body: Amendments are now supported. In the Candidates tab, candidates with revised data show a ✎ badge — click to view the delta report. In the Simulation tab, select a revision from the dropdown to see how amended fields change marks.

title: Data & Access Update
body:
The grievance dataset has been updated to include all available decisions processed up to 20 June 2026.

Merit trends, simulations, and verification analysis have been refreshed accordingly.

To support platform maintenance and reduce unauthorized redistribution of data, access to advanced simulation and verification tools is temporarily available through an access request. The minimum contribution is PKR 250.

Existing approved users will retain their access.
